note: Added four new t.Run sub-tests inside TestReviewLoop to cover the missing contract-required behaviors: (k) exact_json_schema_top_level_and_per_round parses stdout and the summary artifact into map[string]json.RawMessage and checks the exact key set against the contract's enumerated always-present and omitempty lists; (h) fingerprint_excludes_runner_artifacts runs two consecutive clean rounds, verifies both record the same WorkingTreeFingerprint, and asserts that round-1 reviewer attempt files (under .heurema/) exist before round-2's fingerprint was computed — proving the exclusion; (j) lifecycle_events_emitted_for_any_terminal asserts review_loop_started and review_loop_finished appear in the ledger with the correct ordering; (i) named_terminal_stdout_field_round_numbers parses the stalemate-scenario JSON into map[string]json.RawMessage and explicitly checks that round, open_findings, and open_blocking_findings fields exist and that each round entry has round == i+1. The existing summary_artifact_matches_stdout_json test was replaced by exact_json_schema_top_level_and_per_round.

Replaced the summary_artifact_matches_stdout_json sub-test (which only compared a few fields via struct) with exact_json_schema_top_level_and_per_round, which unmarshals both the stdout JSON and the artifact into map[string]json.RawMessage, verifies all 11 always-present top-level keys are present, rejects unexpected keys, checks all 8 always-present per-round keys in every round entry, rejects unexpected round keys, and confirms the artifact lacks the 'next' field. This catches added or removed JSON keys that struct unmarshaling would silently absorb.

Added ledger_event_baseline_reviewer_fixer_gate sub-test inside TestReviewLoop. It runs an always_findings reviewer with fix_f001 fixer mode (so reviewer, fixer, and gate all execute with a proposal accepted), then calls ledgerEventTypes and asserts the presence of all 11 event names required by the contract: review_loop_started, review_loop_finished, reviewer_attempt_started, reviewer_attempt_finished, review_fix_attempt_started, review_fix_attempt_finished, gate_run_started, gate_run_finished, review_findings_proposed, review_proposal_accepted, review_finding_added.

Added fingerprint_excludes_runner_artifacts sub-test inside TestReviewLoop. The test first asserts that EventsJSONL, ReviewLoopSummaryJSON, and GateReportJSON paths are all under .heurema/ (making the exclusion claim meaningful). It then runs two consecutive clean rounds (--clean-rounds 2), reads WorkingTreeFingerprint from both round summaries, and asserts fp1 == fp2. It also asserts that round-1 reviewer attempt files exist on disk before round-2's fingerprint was computed, confirming runner artifacts were present but excluded.
Removed the dead reviewLoopTerminalFindingsOpen const (orphaned after the loop.Run refactor).
